Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Urinalysis  ·  California

Urinalysis cost in California.

Cash-pay range for urinalysis across 45 hospitals in California: $11 to $121. CPT code 81002. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$11
USC Verdugo Hills Hospital
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$121
Monterey Park Hospital
Monterey Park, CA
